Container.Name: PlexMind
Container.Overview:
AI-powered Plex recommendations using a fully local LLM (Ollama). Analyzes each user's watch history and generates personalized movie/TV picks — no cloud, no API costs, no data leaving your server.
Also includes: Whisper ASR subtitle generation, Ollama-powered subtitle translation, and library maintenance tools.
Requires: Ollama container running with a model pulled (recommended: qwen3.5:9b for 12GB VRAM, gemma3:4b for 8GB).
Web dashboard at http://[IP]:[PORT:8000]/
Container.Description: PlexMind generates personalized Plex recommendations using a local LLM. See the full README at https://github.com/FineChAInesium/PlexMind for setup instructions and configuration options.

Variable.Name: PLEX_URL
Variable.Description: Your Plex Media Server URL (use LAN IP)

Variable.Name: PLEX_TOKEN
Variable.Description: Your Plex authentication token — find it at plex.tv/claim or in Plex web app preferences URL

Variable.Name: OLLAMA_URL
Variable.Description: Ollama API URL — use LAN IP of the host running Ollama, not localhost

Variable.Name: OLLAMA_MODEL
Variable.Description: Ollama model name (must be pulled first: docker exec ollama ollama pull qwen3.5:9b)

Variable.Name: TMDB_API_KEY
Variable.Description: Optional — enriches recommendations with ratings and posters. Free at themoviedb.org/settings/api

Variable.Name: PLEXMIND_API_KEY
Variable.Description: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED — Protects all API endpoints. Generate a key with: openssl rand -hex 32 and paste it here. If left blank, all endpoints are open to anyone on your network (a WARNING is logged at every startup). If set, add ?api_key=YOUR_KEY to your Plex webhook URL.

Variable.Name: MAX_RECOMMENDATIONS
Variable.Description: Number of recommendations to generate per user

Variable.Name: SUPPRESSION_DAYS
Variable.Description: Days before a recommendation can reappear

Variable.Name: TZ
Variable.Description: Timezone for the scheduled monthly batch run

Variable.Name: WHISPER_CONTAINER_NAME
Variable.Description: Docker container to start before transcription and stop when transcription exits

Variable.Name: OLLAMA_CONTAINER_NAME
Variable.Description: Docker container to start before translation and stop when translation exits

Variable.Name: START_SIDECAR_CONTAINERS
Variable.Description: Set to 1 to start Whisper/Ollama sidecars before script jobs

Variable.Name: STOP_SIDECAR_CONTAINERS
Variable.Description: Set to 1 to stop Whisper/Ollama sidecars when script jobs exit
